BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.admin_users
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    password text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT admin_users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT admin_users_email_key UNIQUE (email)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.app_settings
(
    key character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    value text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT app_settings_pkey PRIMARY KEY (key)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.franchise_leads
(
    id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    full_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    contact_number character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    best_contact_time character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    annual_income numeric,
    proposed_location character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    package_type character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    remarks text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    referral character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    stage character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REGISTERED'::character varying,
    status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NEW'::character varying,
    contact_outcome character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    followup_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    next_followup_at timestamp with time zone,
    last_contacted_at timestamp with time zone,
    assigned_to character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    best_contact_at timestamp with time zone,
    remarks_admin text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    onboarding_step character varying(40) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MANAGEMENT_TRAINING'::character varying,
    CONSTRAINT franchise_leads_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.franchise_requests
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    full_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    contact_number character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    proposed_location character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    preferred_package character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    remarks text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    best_contact_time character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    estimated_annual_income character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    referral character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT franchise_requests_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lead_contact_logs
(
    id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    lead_id uuid NOT NULL,
    contact_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    notes text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT ''::text,
    outcome character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    next_followup_at timestamp with time zone,
    created_by character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    schedule_date_time timestamp with time zone,
    CONSTRAINT lead_contact_logs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_accounts
(
    id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    username character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    password character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    role character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user'::character varying,
    is_active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT user_accounts_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT user_accounts_email_key UNIQUE (email)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.website_tracking_events
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    event_type character varying(60) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    section_key character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    path character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    duration_ms integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    session_id character varying(120) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    user_agent text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ip_address character varying(120) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    occurred_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT website_tracking_events_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.lead_contact_logs
    ADD CONSTRAINT lead_contact_logs_lead_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (lead_id)
    REFERENCES public.franchise_leads (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lead_contact_logs_lead_id
    ON public.lead_contact_logs(lead_id);

END;
